name: ollama-codex
description: A Codex command/control plugin for configuring Codex App and Codex CLI with Ollama.

interface.shortDescription: Use Ollama with Codex through prompts, slash commands, and safe restore flows.
interface.longDescription: Ollama can already work with Codex, but discovery is low and the command surface is tedious to remember. Ollama for Codex makes the supported workflows discoverable from Codex: starter prompts, slash commands, status checks, diagnostics, dry runs, model helpers, App setup, App model switching, CLI profile configuration, and explicit restore flows. For Codex App, it delegates Ollama setup, Ollama model switching, and App restore to Ollama's official `ollama launch codex-app` commands. It can also switch Codex App back to a native Codex/OpenAI model by backing up Codex config and setting the documented native `model` key. For Codex CLI, it can create a non-launching `ollama-launch` profile for a chosen model, restore via `ollama launch codex --restore`, and prepare terminal commands for `codex --oss`, `codex --oss -m <model>`, or `codex --profile ollama-launch`. Codex App and Codex CLI restore paths stay separate, and provider changes remain explicit. A native visual model picker inside Codex Mac app is not currently a verified public plugin surface; the experimental `/ollama` widget path is retained for future host support and diagnostics.
defaultPrompt: Set up Codex App with Ollama
Switch Codex App between Codex and Ollama models
